parameters.query:
SELECT id,
  COALESCE(url, '') AS url,
  COALESCE(color, '') AS color,
  COALESCE(doors, 0)::int AS doors,
  COALESCE(seats, 0)::int AS seats,
  COALESCE(power_cv, 0)::int AS power_cv,
  COALESCE(displacement, '') AS displacement,
  COALESCE(consumption, 0) AS consumption,
  COALESCE(body_type, '') AS body_type,
  COALESCE(traction, '') AS traction,
  COALESCE(co2, '') AS co2,
  COALESCE(image_url, '') AS image_url
FROM moveadvisor_market_offers
WHERE portal = 'flexicar'
  AND enrich_tried_at IS NULL
  AND (
    COALESCE(color, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(doors, 0) = 0
    OR COALESCE(seats, 0) = 0
    OR COALESCE(body_type, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(displacement, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(consumption, 0) = 0
    OR COALESCE(traction, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(co2, '') = ''
  )
ORDER BY first_seen_at ASC
LIMIT 500
